name: CGTMSE Scheme
description: Collateral-free credit for micro and small enterprises up to ₹5 Crore. Provides guarantee cover up to 85% for loans.

name: PMMY (MUDRA Yojana)
description: Loans up to ₹10 Lakhs for non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. Categories: Shishu (up to 50K), Kishore (up to 5L), Tarun (up to 10L).

name: Stand-Up India
description: Loans between ₹10 Lakh and ₹1 Crore for SC/ST or Women entrepreneurs setting up a greenfield enterprise.

name: ZED Certification Scheme
description: Financial support for MSMEs in ZED certification, tech upgradation, and quality improvement to enhance global competitiveness.

name: CLCSS Scheme
description: 15% capital subsidy for induction of well-established and improved technology in specified sub-sectors.

name: TReDS Platform
description: Electronic platform for facilitating the financing / discounting of trade receivables of MSMEs from corporate and other buyers.
